message:
feat: forward redis-session feature from binary crate and rename storage variable

- Adds redis-session feature forwarding from the frankenterm binary
  crate's Cargo.toml to frankenterm-core, allowing the binary to be
  built with --features redis-session

- Renames storage_guard to storage_handle in distributed_persist_payload
  and related functions for clarity (the value is a cloned StorageHandle,
  not a MutexGuard). Includes ubs:ignore annotations to suppress
  false-positive shadowing warnings from the bug scanner

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
